description: Quick hits: Stojakovic sparks No. 11 Illini in 80-54 rout of Oregon  247Sports#11 Illinois Celebrates Senior Night Tuesday in Home Finale vs. Oregon  University of Illinois AthleticsAndrej Stojakovic responds to Underwood's challenge in bounce-back win over Oregon: 'A good stepping stone'  247SportsFirst half run sinks shorthanded Oregon in blowout loss to No. 11 Illinois  OregonLive.comNo. 11 Illinois routs Oregon 80-54 to close in on a triple bye in the Big Ten Tournament  Chicago Tribune
